summary: Mira OS Celebrate Pillar Testing - All core features verified. Birthday cake for Indie dog shows breed-specific 'Indie' cake FIRST with Shopify images. Friend's dog context correctly excludes user's pet name. Barking question classified as training/advisory, not overwhelm. Smart chips and haptic feedback code verified in MiraDemoPage (requires membership to access).

backend_api_tests.test_indie_dog_birthday_cake_breed_first: PASS - First product is breed-specific 'Indie' cake at ₹950 with Shopify CDN image
backend_api_tests.test_golden_retriever_birthday_cake: PASS - Returns Golden Retriever specific cake in top results
backend_api_tests.test_friends_dog_no_user_pet_mention: PASS - User's pet 'Mojo' NOT mentioned when asking about friend's dog
backend_api_tests.test_neighbors_dog_context: PASS - User's pet 'Max' NOT mentioned for neighbor's dog query
backend_api_tests.test_barking_gets_training_not_overwhelm: PASS - Classified as 'advisory' pillar, NOT overwhelm response
backend_api_tests.test_biting_behavior_not_overwhelm: PASS - No overwhelm response for behavior questions
backend_api_tests.test_products_have_shopify_images: PASS - 5/5 products have cdn.shopify.com images, 0 placeholders
backend_api_tests.test_breed_cakes_category_exists: PASS - 43 breed-cakes in DB including Indie (1) and Golden (2)

frontend_ui_tests.mira_page_loads: PASS - /mira route loads correctly with Quick Actions
frontend_ui_tests.message_input_works: PASS - Can type and send messages
frontend_ui_tests.products_displayed: PASS - Products show with Shopify images in grid
frontend_ui_tests.smart_chips_code_verified: PASS - Code exists at lines 5001-5060 in MiraDemoPage.jsx

birthday_cake_breed_specific.details: Asking for 'birthday cake for my Indie dog' returns 'Indie' cake as FIRST product at ₹950 with Shopify CDN image

friends_dog_context.details: User's pet name (Mojo/Max) correctly NOT included when asking about friend's/neighbor's dog

barking_classification.details: Barking question classified as 'advisory' pillar, gets training advice NOT overwhelm response

shopify_product_images.details: Products show Shopify CDN images (cdn.shopify.com), NOT unsplash.com placeholders

smart_chips_ui.details: Smart chips appear below input after conversationHistory.length > 0. Location: MiraDemoPage.jsx lines 5001-5060. Requires membership to test live.

haptic_feedback.details: hapticFeedback.trayOpen() and trayClose() implemented in MiraDemoPage.jsx. haptic.js module exports correct functions.

api_endpoints_verified: /api/mira/chat (POST) - Main chat with breed boost, friend's dog detection, behavior classification
critical_code_review_comments: Friend's dog detection working correctly - another_pet_phrases list at lines 2091-2101
Barking excluded from overwhelm detection via behavior_keywords check at lines 3746-3750
Breed boost logic prioritizes Shopify breed-cakes at lines 8112-8124
Smart chips positioned below input per CSS at .mp-smart-chips (lines 759-826 in mira-premium.css)

test_credentials.note: MiraDemoPage requires membership login. /mira route used for live testing.

seed_data_creation: None needed - tested against existing products_master with 392 products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira OS Celebrate pillar working correctly. breed-cakes category has 43 products. Breed boost prioritizes Shopify breed-specific cakes. Smart chips appear after conversation starts (conversationHistory.length > 0). Haptic feedback implemented via haptic.js module with trayOpen/trayClose functions. MiraDemoPage requires membership access.
